title: FWKV: Simplicity Is All You Need for Efficient Language Modeling
summary: The FWKV family of recurrent language models (29M–56M params) achieves up to 48.1 tok/s on CPU via a fixed-decay accumulator computed with an O(log T) vectorized parallel scan, eliminating both quadratic attention and the KV cache. The architecture pairs this recurrent core with a parameter-free suffix-automaton copy mechanism (ROSA) for exact long-range copying, and requires no custom CUDA kernels, no gating, and no position embeddings. Models are available under Apache 2.0.
